name: Hidden Treasures
recipeIngredient: 48 Maraschino Cherries, well drained on paper towels
1 cup White Melting Chocolate, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 60 Minutes Bake Time: 10 Minutes
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the Butter Flavor Crisco, sugar, egg, milk, and vanilla extract until well blended.
3. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda. Add this dry mixture to the Creamed mixture and beat on low speed until combined.
4. Spread the dough in a very thin layer around the cherries on an ungreased baking sheet, placing them about 2 inches apart.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes. Let cool for one minute on the baking sheet before transferring to a cooling rack to cool completely.
6. For Dipping Chocolate: Melt chocolate of choice and Butter Flavor Crisco using low heat or 50% power in microwave, stirring until smooth.
7. Place cookies into a glass measuring cup. Drop one cookie at a time into the melted chocolate, turning gently with a fork to coat completely. Allow excess chocolate to drip off before placing on wax paper-lined baking sheet.
8. Sprinkle chopped pecans over the white chocolate-coated cookies and slivered white chocolate over the dark chocolate-coated cookies while the chocolate is still wet. Refrigerate until set.
Makes 4 dozen cookies
If the chocolate becomes too firm, gently reheat it on low heat.
